Office of the Vice President for Information Services and Technology

Haggerty, Blake

Interim Vice President of Information Services and Technology

View Profile

Heaney, Pauline

Executive Assistant

View Profile

Digital Learning and Campus Support

Haggerty, Blake

Interim Vice President of Information Services and Technology

View Profile

Krawiec, Justine

Director, Learning Technologies

View Profile

Klobucista, Sami

Director User Services & Technologies

View Profile

Stickna, Phil

Director, Media and Technology Support Services

View Profile

Farber, Anthony

Assistant Director IST Service Desk

View Profile

Enterprise Applications

Goel, Pooja

Associate Vice President for Enterprise Applications & Associate CIO

View Profile

Knape, Dean

Director, Applications Management Group

View Profile

Kenrick, Peggy

Director, Digital Process and Design,

View Profile

Marici, Carmen

Director, Business Information Systems

View Profile

Strum, Samuel

Director, Business Intelligence

View Profile

Sequeira, Sasha Ann

Associate Director of Business Intelligence

View Profile

Valkenburg Sr, Stephen

Director, CRM & Student Information Systems

View Profile

Provides support for the University's foundational enterprise systems, including Human Resources, Finance, and Student Information, as well as the Google Workspace and Identity/Access Management platforms. 

Research IT

Pacheco, Alex

Associate CIO - Advanced Research Computing

View Profile

Cahill, Kate

Director, High Performance Research Computing

View Profile

Provides NJIT's research and teaching community with advanced computing resources; fostering technological expertise, and promoting innovation through reliable infrastructure and collaborative support.

Portfolio & Project Management

Haies, Frances

Director of Portfolio and Project Management

View Profile

Hascup, Bruce

Assistant Director Project Management

View Profile

Maintain and report on the IT project portfolio, acting as project advisors and consultants.

Data Analytics & Data Governance

Establish data governance policies and practices to ensure trusted and understood data from all sources across the university. 

Core & Cloud Infrastructure

Hoskins, Matthew

Director, Core Systems and Cloud Services

View Profile

Provide centralized IT infrastructure to support the services and strategies of the division. Core Systems manages infrastructure underpins many critical IST services, we provide centralized compute and storage by way of AWS and Azure cloud (IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS), Vmware virtual machines, NetApp storage, Box storage, Active Directory and Domain services, Endpoint Management (ManageEngine, Intune, DeepFreeze, Absolute, Ansible, etc) Enterprise cloud backup (Rubrik), System Administration support (Windows and Linux), Physical computing facilities (Newark and Piscataway), and support the cyber security infrastructure (CrowdStrike, Rapid7, Tenable, Proofpoint).

Information Security Services

Kelley, Sharon

Executive Director for Information Security & Chief Information Security Officer

View Profile

Safeguards the institution's digital assets, including sensitive data, research findings, and intellectual property from cyber threats and breaches. 

United Communications & Networking Infrastructure

Shah, Hemal

Director, Unified Communications and Networking

View Profile

Oversees services related to network and telecommunications infrastructure, including wired and wireless connectivity, robust firewall protection, secure remote access, and reliable phone service.
